これは……やはり……: This is... just as I suspected...
男が気を失っている間に、ヒナギは男の衣服を調べた。<br>その懐に、ヒナギの部屋:
While the man was unconscious, Hinagi searched him.
In his breast pocket, she found the grimoire stolen from her room.
この男がこの書物を持っているということは、<br>司令官様に呪詛を掛けたのもおそ:
The fact that this man has this book means he is probably the one
who placed the curse on the Lord Commander...
客の男が意識を取り戻したタイミングで、ヒナギは男を問い詰める。<br>観念した商:
When the man came to, Hinagi confronted him.
The resigned merchant began muttering the whole story.
私は一攫千金を狙って前線基地にやってきたんだが、<br>何をやってもうまくいかず:
I came to the Frontline Base aiming to make a quick fortune, but no
matter what I tried, nothing worked, and I was at my wit's end...
商売はてんで上手くいかない。<br>武器の扱いもできず、魔法も使えない私は、大穴:
My business didn't go well at all. I couldn't handle weapons or use
magic, so I wasn't even allowed to explore the Abyss.
そんな時、あんたが使う陰陽師の呪符の噂を耳にしたんだ。<br>あんたの呪術書を盗:
Then I heard about your Onmyoji talismans and thought if I stole your
grimoire, even a non-magic user like me could use them.
安易な考えですね。<br>これは陰陽道の心得のない人間に扱える代物では……:
That is a simplistic idea. This is not something that can be handled by
someone without knowledge of the Onmyoji arts...
どうやらそうみたいだな。<br>だが、いくつかの術を覚えたら本は返そうと思ってた:
Seems that's true. But I intended to return the book once I learned a
few spells. That's the truth.
俄かには信じがたいですけど……。<br>でも、私の部屋はドアに結界が張っていたは:
I find that hard to believe... But there should have been a barrier on
my door. How did you get in, then?
ドアに結界？ 何言ってるんだ？<br>窓から簡単に忍び込めたんだが……:
A barrier on the door? What are you talking about? I sneaked in
easily through the window...
ええ？ 窓からって！ わ、私の部屋、宿舎の３階ですよ！？:
Huh? Through the window! M-My room is on the third floor of the
dormitory!
男は見た目によらず身軽らしく、<br>壁伝いに宿舎を登り、窓からヒナギの部屋に侵:
The man was apparently more agile than he looked; he climbed up the
dormitory wall and entered Hinagi's room through the window.
そこまでは上手くいった。だが探索者の面接で呪術を披露したが、<br>にわか仕込み:
That part went well. But when I demonstrated the curse at the
explorer interview, my hastily learned technique was seen through.
あの……英雄の血筋だと噂の、憎たらしい司令官の野郎にな！<br>お陰でこっちはと:
That damned Commander rumored to have the Hero's Blood! Thanks to
him, I've finally run out of funds.
まさか、それで司令官様の命を？:
Surely you did not... try to take the Lord Commander's life because of
that?
いや、命まで奪うつもりはなかったさ。<br>呪符を使って、英雄の血筋であるアイツ:
No, I didn't intend to go as far as taking his life. I thought I'd use the
talisman to steal the power of that guy with the Hero's Blood.
それが、あの呪詛だったんですね……<br>修行も積んでいない人が、そんな呪術を掛:
So that was the curse you cast... For someone without any training to
try to cast such a curse...
で、私が『摩臍過気の法』を使って、<br>呪詛返しをしてしまったというわけなんで:
And so, I ended up using the Maseikaki Method to reflect the curse
back on you...
はい。呪詛を仕掛けた張本人に、その邪気をそのままお返しするというもの。<br>す:
Yes. It returns that malign energy directly to the one who cast the
curse. I apologize, but that's why you were filled with it.
じ、自分が変になっていたのは、理解している……<br>そうか、私の邪念がそのまま:
I-I understand that I was acting strange... So that's it... my evil
thoughts came right back to me... I'm truly sorry...
ヒナギはルディアと共に、男の娼館から立ち去るのを見送った。: Hinagi and Ludia saw the man off as he left the brothel.
良かったわねぇ、あの人。<br>改心してくれて。: That's a relief, isn't it? He had a change of heart.
そ、そうですね……。<br>呪術などに頼らず、真面目に働いてくれると信じて……ま:
Y-Yes, indeed... I believe he'll work hard without relying on Curse
magic... I truly do.
ヒナギが急に意識を失い、<br>その場に膝から崩れ落ちて倒れてしまう。:
Hinagi suddenly lost consciousness and collapsed, her knees giving
way.
ヒナギさん！？ ヒナギさんっ！？<br>誰か！ 誰か来て！ ヒナギさんがっ！: Hinagi! Hinagi! Someone! Someone come! Hinagi is—!
